mean_cn: adj.机械的，机械学的，机械性的
mean_en: operated by power from an engine; connected with machines and engines; (of people’s behaviour and actions) done without thinking, like a machine
sentence: We can use this mechanical claw to pick up dolls.
sentence_trans: 我们可以用这个机械爪来抓娃娃。
word_etyma: mechanic机械工，技工 + al形容词后缀 → 机械相关的 → mechanical机械的，机械学的
